name: Suncorp Group Limited
analysis: SUN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$17.9800. Trade idea: entry A$18.3800, stop A$16.8696, target A$22.9112 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
